name: converter
title: Converter
description: Convert images, HEIC, and PDFs — split, merge, rotate, compress, extract
author: Andrew Horbach

commands.name: img-to-pdf
commands.title: Images to PDF
commands.subtitle: Images → PDF
commands.description: Select images and combine into a single PDF

commands.name: heic-to-jpg
commands.title: HEIC to JPG
commands.subtitle: HEIC → JPG
commands.description: Convert all HEIC files in a folder to JPG

commands.name: pdf-merge
commands.title: Merge PDFs
commands.subtitle: PDF → PDF
commands.description: Select PDF files and merge into one

commands.name: split-pdf
commands.title: Split PDF
commands.subtitle: PDF → pages
commands.description: Split a PDF into individual pages

commands.name: extract-pages
commands.title: Extract Pages
commands.subtitle: PDF → PDF
commands.description: Extract a page range from a PDF

commands.name: rotate-pdf
commands.title: Rotate PDF
commands.subtitle: PDF → PDF
commands.description: Rotate all pages in a PDF

commands.name: pdf-to-images
commands.title: PDF to Images
commands.subtitle: PDF → PNG
commands.description: Export each PDF page as a PNG

commands.name: compress-pdf
commands.title: Compress PDF
commands.subtitle: PDF → PDF
commands.description: Reduce PDF file size with Ghostscript

commands.name: add-frame
commands.title: Add Frame
commands.subtitle: Frames → PDF
commands.description: Grab image from clipboard and add to PDF queue

commands.name: capture-frame
commands.title: Capture Frame
commands.subtitle: Frames → PDF
commands.description: Take a screenshot selection and add to PDF queue — works with browser videos

commands.name: view-queue
commands.title: View Frames
commands.subtitle: Frames → PDF
commands.description: Browse collected frames and manage the queue

commands.name: finalize-pdf
commands.title: Generate PDF from Frames
commands.subtitle: Frames → PDF
commands.description: Export collected clipboard frames as PDF to Desktop
